option.name: originalContent
option.value: #ApplicationURL URL = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login #Browser details browser = chrome ##Login Credentials username = Admin password = admin123 ##Timeouts(in seconds) pageLoadTimeout = 20 implicitWait = 10

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: #ApplicationURL URL = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login #Browser details browserName = chrome ##Login Credentials username = Admin password = admin123 ##Timeouts(in seconds) pageLoadTimeout = 20 implicitWait = 10
